product_updates.title: Kimi: Threat or menace?
product_updates.content: Chinese company Moonshot AI released a new version of its Kimi model this week, prompting concern about "full AI communism."

product_updates.title: Neil Rimer thinks the AI money is coming back out
product_updates.content: Neil Rimer, the venture capitalist who co-founded Index Ventures, predicts the historic wealth AI is generating in Silicon Valley will have to be redistributed, voluntarily or involuntarily.
